title: ISO 27001 ISMS Implementation Toolkit
summary: An end-to-end simulated ISMS implementation: scope definition, risk treatment plan, and a full Statement of Applicability for a mid-sized fictional organization.
problemStatement: Simulated a mid-sized fintech organization requiring a full ISO 27001:2022-aligned ISMS built from scratch.
businessImpact: Reduced ISMS setup effort through reusable documentation templates and structured control mapping.
architecture: Documentation-first ISMS structure with risk register feeding SoA and control mapping.
riskAnalysis: Identified 34 risks across people, process, and technology domains.
lessonsLearned: Control ownership and evidence traceability are critical in ISO 27001 success.
futureImprovements: Automate SoA-to-policy mapping using Python scripts.

title: Enterprise Risk Register & Heatmap
summary: Structured risk register with automated heatmap visualization for prioritization.
problemStatement: Static spreadsheets made risk tracking inefficient and inconsistent.
businessImpact: Automated scoring and heatmap generation improved clarity of risk prioritization.
architecture: Python script processes risk register and applies conditional formatting for visualization.
lessonsLearned: Standard definitions of risk impact are crucial for consistency.

title: Vendor / Third-Party Risk Assessment Framework
summary: Questionnaire-based framework to assess and classify vendor risk before onboarding.
problemStatement: No structured vendor risk evaluation system existed.
businessImpact: Standardized vendor classification into risk tiers.
architecture: Weighted scoring model with tier-based classification.
lessonsLearned: Data sensitivity is as important as vendor security posture.

title: Security Awareness Training Campaign
summary: Quarterly security awareness program with phishing simulation tracking.
problemStatement: Lack of structured security awareness training.
architecture: Training + tracking model for awareness improvement.
lessonsLearned: Engagement depends more on delivery than content.
